name: Apple Classic
description: Ultra-clean minimalist system utilizing high contrast, fine typography, and high-fidelity product showcases.
promptBlock: Use Apple's design principles. High contrast, generous whitespace, and focus on absolute simplicity. Background is pure white, text is soft charcoal (#1d1d1f). Headings use SF Pro Display with heavy weights and tight letter spacing. Cards should have very soft border-radius (12px), tiny thin borders (#e8e8ed), and extremely low-opacity shadows. Buttons should either be flat black, filled sky blue (#0071e3), or clean borderless text links.
